_publications._publicationTitle: PERADIGM: Phenotype embedding similarity-based rare disease gene mapping.

_contextSnippet: Several genes previously linked to ADPKD, including ALG8, ALG9, and COL4A1, showed marginally significant associations when analyzed with PERADIGM
details: Identified marginally significant associations for ALG8, ALG9, and COL4A1 genes previously linked to ADPKD, while SKAT-O showed no significance for these genes
